script:module:
REM ***** BASIC *****
Sub Main
End Sub
Sub CloseFormB() On Error Resume Next ' 如果已关闭会抛错误，直接跳过 ThisDatabaseDocument.FormDocuments.getByName("开始").close(True) On Error GoTo 0 End Sub
Sub CloseFormA() Dim oFormDoc As Object oFormDoc = ThisDatabaseDocument.FormDocuments.getByName("开始") If Not oFormDoc.isClosed() Then oFormDoc.close(True) ' True=保存后关闭；False=直接关 End If End Sub
Sub SwitchToForm2 ' 获取当前数据库文档 Dim oDoc As Object oDoc = ThisDatabaseDocument
' 获取表单集合 Dim oForms As Object oForms = oDoc.FormDocuments
' 遍历表单集合，找到Form2 Dim oForm As Object Dim i As Integer For i = 0 To oForms.Count - 1 oForm = oForms(i) If oForm.Name = "任务" Then ' 打开Form2 oForm.open Exit For End If Next i
CloseFormB() End Sub
Sub SwitchToForm2AndCloseCurrent ' 获取当前数据库文档 Dim oDoc As Object oDoc = ThisDatabaseDocument
' 获取当前表单 Dim oCurrentForm As Object oCurrentForm = oDoc.CurrentController.ActiveForm
' 获取表单集合 Dim oForms As Object oForms = oDoc.FormDocuments
' 遍历表单集合，找到Form2 Dim oForm As Object Dim i As Integer For i = 0 To oForms.Count - 1 oForm = oForms(i) If oForm.Name = "任务" Then ' 打开Form2 oForm.open Exit For End If Next i
' 关闭当前表单 oCurrentForm.close(True) End Sub
Sub MaximizeFormWindow Dim oDoc oDoc = ThisComponent.CurrentController.Frame.ContainerWindow oDoc.IsMaximized = True End Sub
Sub SetFormWindow() Dim oFrame '当前表单窗口 oFrame = ThisComponent.CurrentController.Frame
' 参数：X, Y, 宽度, 高度，最后 12 表示“同时改位置和大小” oFrame.ContainerWindow.setPosSize(100, 100, 1200, 700, 12) End Sub
